Politics.headline: Reform UK leader Farage faces parliamentary probe over nearly $7m gift
Politics.detail: Nigel Farage, the leader of Reform UK, is under investigation by Parliament regarding a gift of nearly $7 million, and if found guilty, he could be suspended from the House of Commons. The investigation is centered around a gift from a crypto billionaire.

Politics.headline: Vance confronted over 2028 ambitions after Trump teases 'dream team' Rubio ticket
Politics.detail: Speculation is growing around J.D. Vance's potential ambitions for the 2028 election, especially after Donald Trump hinted at a 'dream team' ticket with Marco Rubio. This comes amid ongoing discussions about the future leadership of the Republican party.

Politics.headline: Starmer has 'full confidence' in Streeting despite health secretary's allies saying he is planning to resign
Politics.detail: Keir Starmer has publicly expressed his full confidence in Wes Streeting, even as sources close to the health secretary suggest he may be considering resigning. This situation is creating uncertainty within the Labour party.

Politics.headline: Ottawa proposes suite of measures to streamline project approvals, complete review process within 1 year
Politics.detail: The Canadian federal government is proposing new measures aimed at streamlining the approval process for projects, with the goal of completing reviews within one year. This initiative seeks to expedite project development while maintaining regulatory oversight.

Politics.headline: Gulf states, Jordan demand Iran withdraw 'unilateral' Hormuz Strait rules in UN appeal
Politics.detail: Gulf states and Jordan have jointly appealed to the United Nations, demanding that Iran withdraw its 'unilateral' rules concerning the Strait of Hormuz. This action highlights escalating tensions and diplomatic efforts to address maritime regulations in the region.

Finance & Economy.headline: Milka maker milked shoppers over size of chocolate bars, German court rules
Finance & Economy.detail: Brand owner Mondelēz was accused of reducing weight of Alpine Milk bar from 100g to 90g without significantly altering the packaging, leading to a court ruling against them.

Finance & Economy.headline: Producer price inflation rises more than expected
Finance & Economy.detail: The Producer Price Index (PPI) inflation accelerated to 6.0% year-over-year in April, exceeding forecasts, with elevated oil prices being a major driver as energy prices rose about 22% from the previous year. Core PPI, excluding food and energy, also surprised to the upside, rising to 5.2% year-over-year, compared with estimates of 4.3%.

Finance & Economy.headline: Senate confirms Kevin Warsh as Fed chair as Trump presses for lower rates
Finance & Economy.detail: The Senate has confirmed Kevin Warsh as the chairman of the Federal Reserve, a move hailed as a victory for President Trump, who has been advocating for lower interest rates. Jerome Powell will remain on the Fed Board.

Finance & Economy.headline: As midterms approach, Trump is making Republicans' inflation problem worse
Finance & Economy.detail: With the midterm elections approaching, President Trump's economic policies are reportedly contributing to rising inflation, posing a challenge for Republicans. Some of his main economic policies are causing prices to rise.

Finance & Economy.headline: Global Economy: Tenuous Resilience amid Persistent Uncertainty
Finance & Economy.detail: The IMF projects global growth at 3.1 percent in 2026, noting this is an upward revision from their April forecast, and expects global inflation to fall; however, US inflation is predicted to remain above target. Downside risks from potentially higher tariffs, elevated uncertainty, and geopolitical tensions persist.

Technology.headline: Meta launches WhatsApp ‘incognito’ mode to address privacy concerns for AI chats
Technology.detail: Meta Platforms is introducing an “incognito” mode for WhatsApp to allow private conversations with its AI chatbot, ensuring that no one other than the user can read the messages exchanged.

Technology.headline: Google disrupts hackers using AI to exploit an unknown weakness in a company's digital defense
Technology.detail: Google has successfully disrupted hackers who were using artificial intelligence to exploit a previously unknown vulnerability in a company's digital defenses.

Technology.headline: Apple Hedges Bets on Chips in Talks with Intel, Samsung
Technology.detail: Apple is reportedly exploring U.S.-based chip production partnerships with Intel and Samsung as geopolitical tensions and supply chain concerns push tech companies to diversify manufacturing beyond Taiwan.

Technology.headline: Sam Altman defends OpenAI in courtroom showdown with Elon Musk
Technology.detail: Sam Altman is defending OpenAI in a courtroom battle against Elon Musk.

Technology.headline: Microsoft's CTO testifies about email at the heart of Elon Musk's allegations against the tech giant
Technology.detail: Microsoft CTO Kevin Scott publicly addressed for the first time a 2018 email that Musk's lawyers have cited as evidence Microsoft knew OpenAI was abandoning its nonprofit mission.

Science.headline: Europa Clipper and Juice Team Up to Observe Interstellar Comet 3I/ATLAS
Science.detail: The Europa Clipper and Juice missions are joining forces to observe the interstellar comet 3I/ATLAS as it passes through our solar system, providing valuable data on its composition and behavior.

Science.headline: Tiny Bacteria in the Fog May Be Helping Clean the Air
Science.detail: Researchers have discovered that certain types of bacteria found in fog droplets can break down pollutants, potentially playing a role in air purification.

Science.headline: Once-in-a-century 'super' El Niño in the cards as ocean temperatures reach near record highs in April
Science.detail: Ocean temperatures are reaching near record highs in April, increasing the likelihood of a once-in-a-century 'super' El Niño event, which could have significant global climate impacts.

Science.headline: First evidence of Neandertal dentistry found in ancient molar
Science.detail: A 59,000-year-old Neandertal molar unearthed in Siberia shows evidence of being drilled with a stone tool, representing the earliest known instance of primitive dentistry.

Science.headline: UC Davis researchers created brand-new psychedelic-like compounds by shining UV light on amino acid-based molecules.
Science.detail: UC Davis researchers have synthesized novel psychedelic-like compounds by exposing amino acid-based molecules to UV light; these compounds activate key serotonin receptors linked to mental health benefits without the typical hallucinogenic effects.

Health.headline: One in seven in UK prefer consulting AI chatbots to seeing doctor, study finds.
Health.detail: A recent study reveals that a significant portion of the UK population is increasingly turning to AI chatbots for health advice, raising questions about the future of healthcare and patient-doctor relationships.

Health.headline: Obesity rates in some countries levelling off or potentially falling, study finds.
Health.detail: New research indicates a potential shift in the global obesity crisis, with rates stabilizing or decreasing in certain nations, offering a glimmer of hope in the ongoing battle against weight-related health issues.

Health.headline: NHS drugs go-ahead offers lifeline to children with rare muscle-wasting disease.
Health.detail: The National Health Service (NHS) has approved the use of a new drug, providing a much-needed lifeline for children suffering from a rare and debilitating muscle-wasting disease.

Health.headline: Weight gain as adult increases cancer risk by up to five times, research shows.
Health.detail: A recent study highlights the significant impact of adult weight gain on cancer risk, revealing that individuals who gain weight as adults are up to five times more likely to develop certain types of cancer.

Health.headline: FDA Approves Next-Gen Agent for Mantle Cell Lymphoma.
Health.detail: The Food and Drug Administration (FDA) has approved a new, next-generation agent for the treatment of Mantle Cell Lymphoma, offering a new treatment option for patients with this type of cancer.

Sports.headline: Steelers lock up longtime kicker Chris Boswell with new five-year deal
Sports.detail: The Steelers have signed Chris Boswell to a new five-year contract, ensuring their longtime kicker remains with the team for the foreseeable future.

Sports.headline: Jason Collins, NBA's first out gay player, dies at 47 of brain tumour
Sports.detail: Jason Collins, who made history as the first openly gay player in the NBA, has passed away at the age of 47 after battling brain cancer.

Sports.headline: Maple Leafs fire former Flyer Craig Berube as head coach
Sports.detail: The Toronto Maple Leafs have dismissed Craig Berube from his position as head coach after a disappointing season.

Sports.headline: Swiatek sweeps past Pegula and into Italian Open semi-finals
Sports.detail: Iga Swiatek dominated Jessica Pegula to advance to the semi-finals of the Italian Open.

Sports.headline: NFL will play record nine games abroad, including Paris and Melbourne debuts
Sports.detail: The NFL has announced a record nine international games for the upcoming season, including debut matchups in Paris and Melbourne.

Entertainment.headline: Troubling trend for touring musicians
Entertainment.detail: Major musicians from Post Malone to Meghan Trainor have recently struggled to sell out stadiums and arenas for their tours, leading to some cancellations. This trend is being called "blue dot fever".

Entertainment.headline: Geena Davis talks new series "The Boroughs"
Entertainment.detail: Actor Geena Davis discusses her role in the new series "The Boroughs," drawing parallels between herself and her character, and her attraction to supernatural projects while addressing representation in the entertainment industry.

Entertainment.headline: Actor Nick Pasqual convicted of attempted murder for stabbing ex-girlfriend
Entertainment.detail: Nick Pasqual, known for his role in 'How I Met Your Mother,' has been convicted of attempted murder after stabbing his ex-girlfriend, who underwent 14 hours of surgery following the May 2024 attack.

Entertainment.headline: Matthew Perry death case: Drug counselor who delivered fatal ketamine vials sentenced
Entertainment.detail: Erik Fleming received a two-year federal prison sentence for his role in the drug distribution network that led to the death of actor Matthew Perry.

Entertainment.headline: Joe Walsh on custom guitars, craftsmanship and letting go
Entertainment.detail: Joe Walsh is auctioning off some 800 items, including customized guitars and amps, to benefit his military veterans charity. The 78-year-old Eagles guitarist shared the stories behind his beloved gear and discusses how music-making has shifted from the analog era to the digital age.

Crime & Justice.headline: Court overturns Alex Murdaugh's murder convictions, orders new trial
Crime & Justice.detail: Alex Murdaugh was convicted of killing his wife and his son at the family's home in 2021, but the South Carolina Supreme Court overturned the verdict and granted Murdaugh a new trial.

Crime & Justice.headline: Judge shot dead while heading to gym without her bodyguards
Crime & Justice.detail: Lady Pachar was shot while traveling by car to a gym in the southwestern city of Machala.

Crime & Justice.headline: Kouri Richins sentenced in husband's fentanyl-laced cocktail murder
Crime & Justice.detail: Utah mom Kouri Richins was sentenced to life without the possibility of parole on Wednesday, after a jury convicted her of murder and other charges in her husband's 2022 death.

Crime & Justice.headline: Mexican Human Smuggler Sentenced for Role in Years-Long Smuggling Organization
Crime & Justice.detail: A Mexican human smuggler was sentenced for their involvement in a smuggling organization that had been operating for years.

Crime & Justice.headline: Gang Members Sentenced to 50 Years Each for Murdering Fellow Gang Member
Crime & Justice.detail: Gang members have been sentenced to 50 years each for the murder of a fellow gang member.

Education.headline: Secretary McMahon Announces $144M Boost for Students with Disabilities
Education.detail: U.S. Secretary of Education Linda McMahon announced a new $144 million investment by the Trump Administration to help states expand proven interventions that support students with disabilities.

Education.headline: U.S. Department of Education Announces Grant Competition to Empower States Through a Reimagined Comprehensive Centers Program
Education.detail: The U.S. Department of Education (ED) issued the Fiscal Year (FY) 2026 competition for the Comprehensive Centers Program, reaffirming the Trump Administration's commitment to return education to the states.

Education.headline: U.S. Department of Education & Department of Labor Announce Additional Grant Competitions Under Elementary and Secondary Education Partnership to Promote Career Pathways
Education.detail: The U.S. Departments of Education (ED) and Labor (DOL) issued the Fiscal Year (FY) 2026 competition for the Career Pathways Exploration (CPE) and Teacher Quality Partnership (TQP) Programs.

Education.headline: School District Refuses to Sign Federal Agreement, Change Trans Student Rules
Education.detail: A school district refused to sign a federal agreement despite looming threats of funding cuts, regarding rules for transgender students.

Education.headline: Firefighter travels 600 miles to college graduation of baby he helped deliver years ago
Education.detail: A firefighter traveled 600 miles to attend the college graduation of a person he helped deliver as a baby, and they have maintained a special bond through the years.

Lifestyle.headline: Models welcome a new wave of maturity on Australian fashion week runways
Lifestyle.detail: Australian Fashion Week 2026 showcases a shift towards embracing older models, reflecting a broader trend of inclusivity in the fashion industry.

Lifestyle.headline: Cozy Earth review: I tested the buzzy bedding and sleepwear brand. Here are its best, most comfy pieces.
Lifestyle.detail: A review of Cozy Earth bedding and sleepwear highlights the brand's most comfortable pieces.

Lifestyle.headline: How Sacred Games Actor Is Battling Breast Cancer's 'Invisible Demons' At 43
Lifestyle.detail: A 43-year-old actor from Sacred Games shares her experience battling breast cancer and the challenges she faces.

Lifestyle.headline: Brand-New Baby Goat Tries To Bond With Ram-But He's Not Having It
Lifestyle.detail: A newborn baby goat attempts to befriend a ram, but the ram is unreceptive to the baby goat's advances.

Lifestyle.headline: The high-functioning Filipina is not always well
Lifestyle.detail: The article discusses high-functioning distress, a behavioral pattern where an individual meets every external demand while drowning internally.

Opinion/Editorial.headline: Labour needs a battle of ideas now, not a scramble to snatch the keys to No 10
Opinion/Editorial.detail: Rafael Behr argues that Labour's current leadership chaos requires a deep dive into ideas to address voters' desire for improved living standards.

Opinion/Editorial.headline: David Attenborough is not just a national treasure: he is also the most radical person on TV
Opinion/Editorial.detail: Jonathan Liew discusses David Attenborough's radical impact as more than just a national treasure, celebrating his influence on television and beyond.

Opinion/Editorial.headline: J.D. Tuccille: Trump's auto tariffs are soaking American buyers, and it is getting worse
Opinion/Editorial.detail: J.D. Tuccille writes that Trump's protectionist auto tariffs are leading to higher prices and limited markets for American buyers.

Opinion/Editorial.headline: Lessons from hantavirus scare: No country can erect walls high enough to keep disease out
Opinion/Editorial.detail: This editorial discusses the lessons learned from a recent hantavirus scare, emphasizing that no country can isolate itself from disease outbreaks.

Opinion/Editorial.headline: Editorial Board. A desperately needed reset at the FDA.
Opinion/Editorial.detail: The Washington Post Editorial Board argues for a reset at the FDA.

World.headline: Iran slams 'collusion with Israel' as Netanyahu reports 'secret' UAE visit
World.detail: Iranian first vice president said Tehran's 'right' to the Strait of Hormuz is 'established and the matter is closed'.

World.headline: Trump set to meet China's Xi in Beijing for talks on trade, tech and Iran
World.detail: U.S. President Donald Trump walks with Chinese Vice President Han Zheng during an arrival ceremony.

World.headline: Family of British couple jailed in Iran say they have lost contact
World.detail: The British couple jailed in Iran, have lost contact with their family.

World.headline: Gunfire breaks out in Philippine Senate where authorities tried to arrest a senator
World.detail: Gunfire erupted in the Philippine Senate during a standoff with a senator wanted by the ICC.

World.headline: Netanyahu's office says he visited UAE secretly during the Iran war
World.detail: Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu reportedly made a secret visit to the United Arab Emirates during the Iran war.

Zimbabwe.headline: Govt slashes health fees by up to 50%
Zimbabwe.detail: The government has announced a reduction of up to 50% in health fees, aiming to improve access to healthcare services for the population.

Zimbabwe.headline: Land Reform “Irreversible”, But 67 BIPPA Farms To Be Returned – Minister Masuka
Zimbabwe.detail: Minister Masuka stated that while the land reform program is irreversible, 67 farms covered by Bilateral Investment Promotion and Protection Agreements (BIPPA) will be returned.

Zimbabwe.headline: Deputy Health Minister Slams Nurses For Dancing For Cash At Parirenyatwa
Zimbabwe.detail: The Deputy Health Minister criticized nurses at Parirenyatwa Hospital for dancing for money, raising concerns about professional conduct.

Zimbabwe.headline: Wetlands Under Threat: CHRA Urges Parliament To Domesticate Ramsar Convention
Zimbabwe.detail: The Combined Harare Residents Association (CHRA) is urging Parliament to domesticate the Ramsar Convention to protect wetlands.

Zimbabwe.headline: Zimbabwe eyes food security boost with 900,000MT strategic grain reserve.
Zimbabwe.detail: Zimbabwe is aiming to enhance its food security by establishing a strategic grain reserve of 900,000 metric tons.
